capture.title: The idea takes shape before it slips away
capture.body: Register each idea with the context it needs — platform, format, topic and role.

brief.title: A brief made for you, not for the average
brief.body: The system generates a brief adapted to your voice and history.
brief.body_strong: If it doesn't feel right, ask for an alternative.
brief.body_end: The starting point is always yours.

insights.title: Your creative process, visible for the first time
insights.body: Discover which topics you dominate, which formats work for you and
insights.body_strong: which angles you haven't explored yet.
